details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

about_item: AIRLINE APPROVED: This travel bag meets airline carry-on requirements and includes a luggage ID tag, ensuring hassle-free travel.
2 DOG FOOD BOWLS: Includes 2 5-cup collapsible dog water bowls that are made of dishwasher safe silicone for easy cleaning and storage.
2 DOG FOOD CARRIERS: Includes 2 lined pet food storage container bags to store up to 30 cups of dog food or treats!
CONVENIENT FEATURES: Equipped with a zippered inside pocket for secure storage, a divider to keep food carriers stacked neatly, an adjustable shoulder strap, a removable placemat, and more!
EASY TRANSPORT: Designed to easily rest through a suitcase's pull-up handle with the attached luggage sleeve, making it perfect for on-the-go convenience.

features.title: Week Away Carry Tote
features.text: Makes it simple to travel with your dog for up to a week away. This bag meets airline carry-on requirements and even includes a luggage ID tag. Includes two 2 cup collapsible dishwasher safe silicone bowls and placemat as well as two lined carriers to store 10 cups of dog food or treats. Bag also has a zippered inside pocket for secure storage, a divider to keep food carriers stacked neatly, an adjustable shoulder strap and more. Easily rests through a suitcase's pull-up handle with the attached luggage sleeve.

features.title: Week Away Duffle
features.text: Organized luggage system with accessories that now makes it simple to travel with your dog for any length of time. We have several pet travel luggage options for any size dog or situation that holds items such as toys, water, food, treats, leash, harness, waste bags, and other pet essentials. These travel bags for dogs allow you to expertly pack and organize your pet’s belongings, easily find and access them, with everything in one easy-to-reach place.

features.title: Rolling Week Away Tote
features.text: Whether going out for a few hours, the weekend, or on a longer trip, we’ve got the perfect travel bags for your dog! This dog luggage bag features: large main compartment, divider for food carriers, zippered inside pocket, zippered front pocket, adjustable padded shoulder strap, 2 sturdy luggage wheels, mesh pocket in front compartment and on sides, locking telescopic handle, and top bungee cord.

product_description.title: The Mobile Dog Gear Story
product_description.text: Everyone loves their dog, but at Mobile Dog Gear we love EVERYONE’S dog, which is why we’ve crafted a collection of bags, duffels, backpacks and accessories designed specifically for toting your pup’s food, toys, treats and other items. No longer will you and your best friend be kept on a short leash! Our line of travel bags and accessories make a great gift for pet adoption parties, puppy showers, pet birthdays, gotcha parties, holiday gifts, or any occasion. When you purchase a gift from Mobile Dog Gear, they will know you were not only thinking about them but their dog as well! Whether your adventures are near or far, Mobile Dog Gear’s pet luggage and travel accessories make it simple to travel with your dog! Besides our patents pending organized luggage and feeding systems, we also make the highest quality pet travel accessories for any size dog you'll need for your trip.

summary.text: Customers find the dog travel bag fantastic, with plenty of room for two weeks of dehydrated dog food and everything needed for a week away from home. The bag is well-organized with separate compartments, and customers appreciate its size, being big enough without being bulky. The durability and zipper quality receive mixed reviews - while some find it durable with well-made zippers, others report that the bowls break immediately and the zippers go off track.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers praise the quality of the dog travel bag, describing it as a fantastic and perfect tote.

examples.snippet: Great bag, lots of room for leashes, toys, 💦 bottles. I have a goldendoodle that is super active so he needs lots of toys to keep him entertained....
Great product, we have used it for both flight and car travel so far. It's been wonderful and efficient....
Plenty of room for my two dogs’ gear! Good quality, nice collapsible bowls, and I love the included mat to keep spills at the hotel to a minimum.
...- very convenient and well thought out for travel food, water, treats, toys, and extra room for miscellaneous items. Happy with the purchase.

insights.title: Capacity
insights.summary: Customers praise the travel bag's capacity, noting it fits all belongings and can carry two weeks of dehydrated dog food, with one customer mentioning it holds 30 cups of food.

examples.snippet: ...I got the small size for my 8 lb Imperial Shih Tzu, and it fits EVERYTHING (obviously get the bigger bag if you have a big dog)....
Great bag. Lots of room.

This bag is pretty big and spacious. I love the color and style. The inside is made of that cooling material....

insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the durability of the travel bag, with some finding it durable while others report that it completely falls apart and the bowls' seams break immediately.

examples.snippet: ...I would buy this time and time again. It's super sturdy as well! This is probably my favorite Amazon purchase.

...It it is NOT worth the 54.00 price tag. It is cheaply made, flimsy, would never hold amount t of food necessary for a big dog for a week....

insights.title: Zipper quality

examples.snippet: Everything was great until a few weeks ago when one of the zippers broke. Bag was not overstuffed so there was no reason for the failure....

...The only complaint I have is the zippers get stuck easily, one of the zipper handles came off and I had to put back on and squeeze it to make sure...
Love that it zips up and all of my dog’s items fit in it!! It’s awesome!!

authors_reviews.title: Superior bug out bag!
authors_reviews.text: First, the royal blue is true blue. It isn't a washed-out color that was photoshopped to look better. Had that happen before.This bag is amazing.It feels and looks high quality. It isn't flimsy in the least.We have a 70 lb monster, and this bag will hold every thing needed to be able to grab and go.The divider is velcroed in and removes easily, and can be put back in just as easily.The zippers are not super heavy duty, but they are not flimsy and cheap either.Inside the top zipper section is a mesh pocket that is perfect for taking emergency contact and vaccination paperwork.The food bags, very well made, claim to hold 15 cups of food. I think that depends on the size of the kibble, but they are good-sized.The straps are good quality and appear to be strong.There is more than enough room to add extra things the wee monster will need - toys, poop bags, leash, harness, and treats.The collapsible bowls are decent-sized for the travel bag, and love they store in their own section.The bag really is wonderful and will be perfect for vacations, boarding, or the zombie apocalypse.
authors_reviews.author: Y N

authors_reviews.title: Dog luggage, what's next?
authors_reviews.text: You may very well ask yourself why your dog, or, as in our case, dogs, need luggage, but they do. We didn't realize it at first, but when going away for a weekend what are you supposed to do with their food, and what about their vitamins? What about water, and towels, and what if one of them needs medicine? What about all the other myriad of items the pampered pooch of today is in need of, and indeed, as is our opinion, entitled too. So, we bought our dogs some luggage, but not just any luggage, THIS luggage. Why? Because it's the best. First off it's blue, and that matches our luggage, and our car, and the jeans we wear, and my husbands eyes, which is important. Additionally, it's functional, and holds enough dry food, wet food, water bottles, etc... (see above), for an entire weekend. We love the collapsible food and water bowls. The zippers on the bag are very well made, as are the heavy duty handles, and carrying strap. All in all a very good bargain. So listen, if you have a dog, or two, or three, you NEED to buy this now. Don't wait, just go ahead and order it now, and you and your best friend(s) will be prepared to go when the time comes.
authors_reviews.author: FallingUpInOKC

authors_reviews.title: Love this!
authors_reviews.text: After reading many reviews about cheap zippers/quality I was hesitant to buy..but I took a chance. I was pleasantly surprised when it arrived to find it nicely made and not cheap looking at all. Still I had to try the zipper quality to know for sure. I have used it several times now and so far all is good. I admit I am careful when opening and closing zippers but I have not experienced any issues with them. It is a great organizer for our 3 dogs. It carries their food which 2 of them eat different food so it is great to have 2 containers that will hold enough food for at least 5 days each. We have large dogs so they are healthy eaters. Also, one of them is on medication so the handy net pocketing in the top is perfect for keeping those easily accessible. I keep a large waterbottle in the side pocket and refill it when necessary. It is perfect for quick water stops or even while on the road. The traveling food containers and non slip floormat is perfect for setting up an eating area in your hotel room. I can also store leashes, treats, and other handy items. So far this bag has been a great help for traveling. I recommend buying it and just being aware that as long as you are careful when using the zippers, you should be fine.
authors_reviews.author: Lilo

authors_reviews.title: If you're on the fence, take the plunge and buy this bag!
authors_reviews.text: I was very on the fence about purchasing this bag because of the price. I am so glad I went forward and decided to buy it. The bag is super light and has a deceivingly large amount of space inside. It is lined so that you can wipe it out when you're finished and you dont have to worry about it getting stinky from doggy things. Each foldable storage container holds 5 cups of food- so 10 cups total not 10 cups each bag. If you're going away with your dog for longer than 10 cups of food will last you, I would say size up (or buy a small bag of food when you get there). There is a pocket on the back as well as a water bottle pocket which are both ideal for airline travel. The bag itself is compact and well made. I foresee myself using this bag a lot as it is perfect for my 20lbs Parsons Russell Terrier's eclectic group if travel items!
authors_reviews.author: JChrist210

authors_reviews.title: LOVE
authors_reviews.text: ABSOLUTELY AMAZING for dog travel, keep all their stuff here, easy to access, cute, light weight, and comes with bonus bowls for stuff!
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Make sure the tabs can't fall off.
authors_reviews.text: I so love the dog bag. The only problem I have, is that the first time I sent the bag to doggie daycare, they lost one of the tabs. I then realized there was too much room left for it to slip off. They couldn't find the tab. So I bought new tabs but by trying to reinstall the tab the unit broke off. I know it's not a big deal but it is to me.
authors_reviews.author: Mindy

authors_reviews.title: Worth it!
authors_reviews.text: This bag has been a total lifesaver! I travel often and my dog goes everywhere with me. I used to have to carry around THREE separate bags with all her stuff. I got the small size for my 8 lb Imperial Shih Tzu, and it fits EVERYTHING (obviously get the bigger bag if you have a big dog). You can really pack it in. I love all the pockets, the zipper feels sturdy, and even when I spilled water on it, the bag stayed dry, the water beaded right off. I’ll definitely be getting a large one for our 2 + week trips. Highly recommend!
authors_reviews.author: Elizabeth Diaz

authors_reviews.title: Nice good quality bag
authors_reviews.text: Roomy bag with two portable dog bowls. It has been on the go bag when i travel with my dog. Good quality too
authors_reviews.author: Angel the Devil

Estuve buscando una que fuera del tamaño justo para mi carrito de perro, pero que no pareciera una bolsa de bebé.El tamaño es justo lo que quería y se nota enseguida que es para perros. ¡Sí! 🐶Compré unos ganchos aparte aquí en Amazon, así la puedo quitar y poner súper fácil cuando pliego el carro.¡Cumple con todo lo que necesito como dueña de perro! 🥳(La tengo en un carrito Ibiyaya Monarch Premium. También tengo el Ibiyaya Cloud 9 y queda perfecta ahí también).______This bag is absolutely perfect! I’ve been looking for one that’s just the right size for my dog stroller – and not one of those baby bags.The size is exactly what I wanted, and you can tell right away it’s made for dogs. Yes! 🐶I got some extra hooks here on Amazon so I can easily take the bag on and off when I fold the stroller.It covers all my needs as a dog owner! 🥳(The bag is on an Ibiyaya Monarch Premium stroller. I also have the Ibiyaya Cloud 9, and it fits perfectly on that one too!)
